items.badge_description: Ahh, the trusty pale ale; crisp, refreshing, and always a good choice in a bind. That's 370 different Pale Ales or American Pale Wheats. Try 5 more for Level 75.

Thanks for staying at home, and checking in with Untappd! It allows us to stay connected to a community of beer lovers, just like you, even if we can't be in the same physical location. From our home to yours, cheers and stay safe!

items.checkin_comment: Sharp and slightly hazy. A beer dominated by hops, cutting through a light combo of citrus at the end.

Your favorite badge-hunting badgers return for Untappd Badgevent Week, and you've unlocked Day 4 of this inaugural set of badges. Keep checking in through December 12th, 2025, to complete the set!

This holiday season, let’s raise our glasses to the wild ride that has been 2025 and toast to all the good times we had along the way!
